title: What time is it?
description: This mod shows the current time in the real world.
body:
What time is it? is this mod for Minecraft that shows time on the screen in the real world. This allows players to keep track of time without having to exit the game. The mod is ideal for those who spend long sessions in the game and want to synchronize game time with real time.

Advantages for the user:

Convenience: You no longer need to be distracted by checking the time on other devices.
Efficiency: Plan your gaming sessions knowing the exact time.

Why it's worth downloading:

This mod is the perfect solution for players who value their time and want to immerse themselves in the gameplay as much as possible. It is easy to install, and you will immediately feel the difference in the convenience of managing your time.
